// <auto-generated />
// This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
// Structure: Array
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

internal static class FastData
{



    private static readonly byte[] _keys = new byte[] {
        byte.MinValue, 1, byte.MaxValue
    };

    
    public static bool Contains(byte key)
    {


        for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++)
        {
            if (key == _keys[i])
                return true;
        }
        return false;
    }

    public const int ItemCount = 3;
    public const byte MinKey = byte.MinValue;
    public const byte MaxKey = byte.MaxValue;
}
